description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

subcriteria.name: code_of_conduct
subcriteria.reference_text: Code of conduct and ethics policy document reviewed and approved by senior management. Covers acceptable use, conflicts of interest, confidentiality obligations, anti-harassment, and data protection. Includes sanctions and disciplinary actions for violations.

subcriteria.name: employee_acknowledgment
subcriteria.reference_text: All employees, contractors, and vendor personnel sign and acknowledge the code of conduct upon hire. Annual reaffirmation required. Signed acknowledgment records maintained with date and employee name. Completion tracked in HRIS or compliance platform like Vanta or Drata.

subcriteria.name: ethics_reporting
subcriteria.reference_text: Anonymous ethics hotline or whistleblower reporting mechanism available to all employees and external parties. Reports investigated and tracked to resolution. Third-party hotline provider such as EthicsPoint or NAVEX.

subcriteria.name: vendor_conduct_standards
subcriteria.reference_text: Third-party contractors and vendor employees are included in conduct standards. Vendor agreements include code of conduct requirements. Background checks performed on contractor personnel before engagement.

mismatch_signals.reason: Technical security controls are not evidence of integrity and ethical values.
Security operations evidence does not demonstrate ethical conduct commitment.
